nodes.label: RAG Architecture
nodes.rationale: Chosen for production-grade LLM systems to enable context-aware, security-grounded answers with data boundaries, explainability, and reliability rather than raw intelligence alone

nodes.label: AI Trust and Outcomes Philosophy
nodes.rationale: Core belief that good AI is about trust, context, and outcomes rather than intelligence alone - shaped by observing gap between impressive demos and real-world reliability

nodes.label: Hybrid RAG System
nodes.rationale: Dense vectors combined with BM25 re-ranking chosen to reduce hallucinations and improve precision in high-stakes security queries where embedding-only search was insufficient

nodes.label: Remote Leaps Founder & Senior Product Engineer
nodes.norm_label: remote leaps founder & senior product engineer

nodes.label: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
nodes.rationale: Early adoption of MCP for secure, scalable tool-calling and agentic workflows in production systems

nodes.label: Hierarchical Token-Aware Summarization
nodes.rationale: Reduces prompt size ~45% without information loss, enabling cost-efficient and low-latency inference in production LLM systems
